NOTE: 

**Fix Branch Name**
- PR branch names should follow this pattern <github-username>/<branch-name>

**Change Github PR Title**
- PR title should follow this pattern `Issue #<issue-id> - <pull-request-title>`

**Add Github PR Description**
- PR description should follow this pattern `Issue #<issue-id>`

- Remove this HTML comment block after making the below changes
 -->
